content: In one sentence: does aggressive microservice decomposition improve developer velocity or slow teams via coordination overhead? Pick one, give the mechanism, no hedging.
In one sentence: does trunk-based development cut integration risk or chiefly limit long-running feature work? Pick one, give the mechanism, no hedging.
In one sentence: does pervasive feature flagging improve release safety or mainly increase configuration complexity and blast radius? Pick one, give the mechanism, no hedging.
In one sentence: does adopting a single monorepo improve consistency more than it slows builds and tooling, or not? Pick one, give the mechanism, no hedging.
